cases.name: INAGRO DEL SUR - DICONSA/SEGALMEX 100% DA Food Supply Capture
cases.notes: No RFC. 32 contracts, 97% DA. 79% value at DICONSA (722M, 29c all DA), 21% at SEGALMEX (194M, 3c all DA). Grain custody/storage/packaging. Distinct from Corporativo Inagro Comercial (case 115, vendor 73979). DICONSA food program DA saturation.
cases.vendor_name: INAGRO DEL SUR SA DE CV

cases.name: TECNOLOGIA EN SEGURIDAD Y COMUNICACIONES - FONACOT IT Security Monopoly via SB
cases.notes: No RFC. 25 contracts, 91% value at FONACOT (893M, 8c). 50% SB + 50% DA at FONACOT. Pluriannual IT security/monitoring contracts. Other FONACOT IT vendors exist (Grupo Vanguardia 623M, IQSEC 465M) so market not structurally limited. Institution-specific IT capture.
cases.vendor_name: TECNOLOGIA EN SEGURIDAD Y COMUNICACIONES SA DE CV

cases.name: TECNOLOGIA APLICADA A NEGOCIOS - SADER/SCT IT Systems Annual SB Capture
cases.notes: No RFC. 26 contracts, 50% DA + 46% SB = 96% non-competitive. 42% value at SADER (259M, 9c, 89% SB) for same IT service renewed annually as sole bidder. Also SCT/SICT 168M, SEGOB 68M (SB), SEP 24M (DA). Industry mismatch: IT company classified as agricultura.
cases.vendor_name: TECNOLOGIA APLICADA A NEGOCIOS SA DE CV

cases.name: GRUPO ESPECIALIZADO SEGURIDAD PRIVADA DIMAC - Manzanillo Port SB Security Capture
cases.notes: No RFC. 13 contracts, 69% SB. 97% value at Manzanillo port (API Manzanillo + Sistema Portuario Nacional). Services: traffic control, personnel admin, CCTV, logistics. All LP won as sole bidder. Port has other large vendors also 100% SB suggesting systemic pattern. Lower confidence: port security may have limited qualified bidder pool.
cases.vendor_name: GRUPO ESPECIALIZADO EN SEGURIDAD PRIVADA DIMAC SA DE CV

cases.name: CASANOVA RENT - SEDESOL 502M Single-Bid Vehicle Rental Anomaly
cases.notes: No RFC. 23 total contracts but 97% of value (503M) in single LP+SB contract at SEDESOL in 2008. Remaining 22 contracts total 15.7M. Vehicle rental company winning 503M LP as sole bidder at SEDESOL, typical contract is 0.2-0.7M. Ratio 1000x normal. Possible overpricing or data error.
